citations.claim: Insider net activity neutral over 3 years: Ron Vachris (CEO, appointed Jan 2024) holds ~170K shares; most Form 4 filings reflect RSU vesting and same-day tax-withholding sales, not discretionary selling
Institutional ownership 68.4% (Vanguard 8.2%, BlackRock 6.9%, State Street 4.8%, Fidelity 5.1%, T. Rowe Price 4.1%)
Top 5 holders concentration 29.1% (sum of Vanguard, BlackRock, State Street, Fidelity, T. Rowe Price)
CEO Ron Vachris ownership ~0.04% (~175K shares / 440M diluted shares outstanding)

citations.claim: CFO Gary Millerchip ownership ~0.02%; compensation primarily salary + annual bonus + RSUs — not a heavily equity-weighted package relative to peers

gaps: Founder Jim Sinegal (retired 2012) and Brotman family legacy ownership not easily traceable via current Form 4 filings; cultural stewardship intact but formal founder-alignment signal weaker than founder-led businesses.
